content.en:
Somewhere in the Void Whale Territory.

More than a dozen high-level immeasurable lifeforms were gathering here, including the seriously injured Hurricane Great Ancestor.

At this time, the Hurricane Ancestor was very weak and had no combat power.

But the other Great Ancestors still respected the Hurricane Great Ancestor very much, and did not dare to have the slightest arrogance.

"Hurricane Ancestor, what should we do now? There is still a long time before the end of the meeting period. Moreover, we have suffered heavy losses this time, and the sea floor gold obtained is very scarce, even if the Void Whale Overlord no longer pursues us, this loss alone will not make up for the loss!"

A high-level immeasurable lifeform said.

This high-level immeasurable lifeform was not the Great Ancestor of the Hurricane Pavilion, but he cooperated with the Hurricane Pavilion, and the force he was in had suffered heavy losses, so he was also panicked in his heart.

Hurricane Great Ancestor's face was gloomy, and he didn't know what to do.

The biggest loss this time was his Hurricane Pavilion, just the high-level immeasurable lifeforms fell four or five, not to mention the middle-level immeasurable lifeforms, the losses were even more, among which there were also high-level immeasurable lifeforms preparation seeds, which were also folded here.

And he was even more devastated, and it will take a long time to recover.

"Everyone is injured, although the Void Whale Overlord is also in a weak period, but the Void Whale Mountain still has enough strength, and this is also their lair, if they attack again, it is very likely to suffer heavy losses again. What's more, those Great Ancestors have collapsed, and if you want to organize them to help us invade Void Whale Mountain again, I'm afraid it's impossible!" said Hurricane Great Ancestor helplessly.

The other Great Ancestors nodded in agreement, at this time, those middle-level immeasurable lifeforms were hiding one by one, even if they were forcibly summoned, they would not dare to invade the Void Whale Mountain!

"Let's all hide during this time, the Void Whale Overlord shouldn't dare to come out, and when the intersection period is over, let's go back!"

Hurricane Ancestor reluctantly proposed.

The other Great Ancestors didn't speak, but they all chose this approach.

......

Time passed slowly, and the Void Whale Territory gradually regained its calm.

The Void Whale Overlord has been staying in the Void Whale Mountain to heal his injuries, for him, he is in a period of weakness, and it is also a period of convergence, and he is out of the voidless galaxy, this is the time when he is most likely to be killed.

Therefore, he will not go out.

When the intersection period was over, even if those high-level immeasurable lifeforms regained their strength, he could easily slaughter them.

So, there was no need for him to take any chances!

Moreover, he still has to protect his Hailou Tianjin.

In this way, the meeting period gradually came to an end.

this day.

The void is turbulent, and this territory is gradually returning to the empty galaxy.

And the Hurricane Great Ancestor and the other Great Ancestors had been waiting at the edge of the territory for a long time, and as soon as the intersection period was over, they immediately escaped from this territory.

Rumble!!!

The confluence period is completely over, and the Hurricane Ancestor and they are all on the giant boat.

And if some Great Ancestors are still hiding and don't come, they just don't care.

Airplanes!!!!

The ship sped away and returned to the Hurricane Collar from here.

Suddenly.

A huge body emerged, and it was the Void Whale Overlord.

"It's not good, the Void Whale Overlord is here!"

The Hurricane Ancestor was shocked.

If they were still in the convergence period, they would not be afraid of these high-level immeasurable lifeforms joining forces to fight against the Void Whale Overlord in the Weak Period.

But now, the convergence period is over, and they are in the Voidless Galaxy, and the suppression of the Voidless Galaxy makes it impossible for these high-level immeasurable lifeforms to exert their true strength, while the Void Whale Overlord can obtain an increase, and his combat power is extremely powerful.

"Give me death!"

The Void Whale Overlord attacked, and in an instant, the giant ship cracked, and the giant boat was still fleeing.

In an instant, they had crossed a long territory and fought in another place.

At the bottom of the river, Ye Tian was watching this scene of fighting, and muttered in his heart: "The Void Whale Overlord in the Voidless Galaxy is too strong, and he is in a weak state, he can beat this group of high-level immeasurable lifeforms, I am afraid that a few more will fall, unless there are powerful high-level immeasurable lifeforms to meet them!"

However, this matter has nothing to do with him.

Ye Tian left here quickly, and he had the resources to copy his body, so nothing would happen.

After leaving this territory, Ye Tian went around and finally returned to the Hurricane Territory.

......

Hurricane Collar.

Ye Tian had already transferred all his resources to the body of the Xuanming Great Ancestor, a replica body, and he had counted the harvest this time, which was enough to make many high-level immeasurable lifeforms go crazy!

Regardless of other resources, just Hailou Gold, he collected a full 180,000 yuan this time.

A piece of Hailou Gold is worth a lot of money, not to mention 180,000 pieces of Hailou Gold, for an ordinary high-level immeasurable lifeform, so much Hailou Gold is an astronomical amount!

"It's a pity that we don't need Shanghai real estate gold at the moment!"

Ye Tian sighed.

After all, Hailou Gold is a resource used by high-level immeasurable lifeforms, although it can be used as a material to refine weapons, but it is too extravagant, and it is too easy to expose.

He didn't want to be so high-profile, he would definitely be targeted.

"Let's see if we can synthesize Hailou Finance into Hailou Tianjin!"

Immediately, Ye Tian started such an attempt, anyway, he had more Hailou gold, so he was not afraid of failing the experiment.

Soon, one piece after another of the sea building gold was fused by Ye Tian with the ability to fuse all things.

After fusing thirty-six pieces of Hailou Gold, Hailou Gold finally underwent a qualitative change.

Rumble!!!!

A piece of Hailou Tianjin was born, and its light had long been covered by the prepared Ye Tian, so it did not leak out.

"Sure enough, it fused out the !!! of Hailou Tianjin"

Ye Tian said excitedly.

This is the Hailou Heavenly Gold that even a high-level immeasurable lifeform like the Hurricane Great Ancestor is extremely eager for, and now he has it in his hand, and it can be fused into a lot of Hailou Tianjin.

"Hailou Tianjin is so precious, it should have a lot of effects!"

So, Ye Tian went to find out the information of Hailou Tianjin.

This time, Hailou Tianjin appeared in Xumi Whale Mountain, so Ye Tian was not the only ancestor who knew the information of Hailou Tianjin, so he would not arouse the suspicion of others if he inquired about this information, and it was also easy to find out the information of Hailou Tianjin.

"I didn't expect Hailou Tianjin to have such an effect!!"

After Ye Tian learned the information, he was immediately extremely happy.

Hailou Jin is not very useful to him now, but Hailou Tianjin is useful to him now, and it even has a great effect on the impact of middle-level immeasurable lifeforms against high-level immeasurable lifeforms!
